description: Style Note   The Spanish influences in the design details of this sandal is the reason for the Spanish name, senorita. Subtle pastel hues, super soft footbed styling and classic designs with a sophisticated polish, style this pair with kohl-rimmed eyes and an ethno-western ensemble!   Product Description   Sandal with yellow synthetic leather thong style strap with beads on it and a toe separator   An ankle strap with a buckle closure   Smooth, printed footbed   Textured rubber outsole with an upraised heel   Material and Care   Synthetic   Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust   Do not machine wash or use a drier   Do not store in direct sunlight   Style NoteThe Spanish influences in the design details of this sandal is the reason for the Spanish name, Senorita. Subtle pastel hues, super soft footbed styling and classic designs with a sophisticated polish, style this pair with kohl-rimmed eyes and an ethno-western ensemble!Product DescriptionSandal with pink synthetic leather thong style strap with beads on it and a toe separatorAn ankle strap with a buckle closureSmooth, printed footbedTextured rubber outsole with an upraised heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a dryerDo not store in direct sunlight
